evidence.snippet:
### AIRDROP/ PARACHUTE RIGGING ITEMS
AIRDROP EQUIPMENT
-----------------
The below equipment is used on all or one of the following airdrop platform system: “Type V, DRAS, & Combat Expendable (CEP)”.

items.notes: Rigging items, airdrop hardware components (clevis, link assemblies, tie-downs, multi-loops) sold as airdrop equipment.

products_categories.notes: No UAV/UAS/drone content found anywhere in the corpus. UXV relevance is inferred from 'aircraft recovery & deceleration' product line.

evidence.snippet: Paradigm focuses on combining and integrating all support elements needed to conduct airdrop operations and providing customers full solutions, including a mobile training team consisting of qualified trainers. We are a disabled veteran-owned small business strategically based in Pensacola, FL, and well-positioned with experience and world-class partners.

headquarters.notes: Address shown is for Paradigm Parachute & Defense Inc., which acquired ASR-Pioneer assets in April 2024. ASR-Pioneer's original operation was Mississippi-based per acquisition news. Contact page (paradigmparachute.com/contact) was skipped.

evidence.snippet: Paradigm Parachute and Defense Inc. provides high quality, precision manufactured, cargo, personnel, and deceleration parachute products to global commercial and government customers.
### Dependable Supplier of Military Parachute Applications and Equipment

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: ASR-Pioneer (assets now held by Paradigm Parachute) manufactures military parachute systems including 'aircraft recovery & deceleration' products. No explicit UAS/drone-specific product line confirmed in corpus. UXV relevance is indirect via recovery parachute applicability.

evidence.snippet:
-------------
US Army has certified the MSC-11 (G-16) Parachute System as a direct replacement for the aging G-11 parachute system throughout the US DOD. A single version of the G-16 is used to replace all versions of the G-11.

### Next-Gen SET-10 and Next-Gen SET-10R
For Airborne Operations, SET-10 and SET-10XL steerable round main canopies are engineered to put Paratroopers safely on the ground from lower exit altitudes. The Next-Gen SET-10R system can be configured with 26 FT Military Lo-Po or 30 FT Lo-Po canopies to accommodate a wide range of exit weights and deployment speeds.

Paradigm Parachute and Defense is proud to announce the launch of the most advanced altimeter to date, a rugged, wrist-mounted smart display built specifically for the needs of today’s tactical parachutist.
US DoD replacement for the M1.  Advanced Cargo Parachute Release System **[(ACPRS) \[PDF SPEC SHEET\]](http://paradigmparachute.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/Talon-OL.pdf "ACPRS [PDF SPEC SHEET]")**

products.notes: Products page (paradigmparachute.com/products) was skipped; additional SKUs may exist there.

ndaa.notes: Site claims Berry Amendment Compliant / American Made Products, which is adjacent but does not satisfy NDAA Section 848/889 component-level requirements. No explicit NDAA claim found.

evidence.snippet:
Can Paradigm produce low-quantity sustainment orders, in addition to high-rate production?
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Yes, Paradigm’s highly trained staff and flexible operations can support various forms of customer demand, whether low-quantity replacement needs, or high-quantity extended performance contracts.
– Department of Defense Approved Contractor, CAGE: 8DT39

readiness.notes: Catalog products with NSNs/part numbers actively listed; FAQ confirms capability for 'low-quantity replacement needs, or high-quantity extended performance contracts'; DoD Approved Contractor (CAGE: 8DT39).

tagline: Pensacola-based manufacturer of military parachute systems—cargo, personnel, extraction, deceleration, and aerial delivery—plus rigging components and training. Disabled veteran-owned small business, ISO 9001 and NIST/CMMC compliant, Berry Amendment eligible. Recently acquired G-12E cargo parachute line and launched smart altimeter for tactical parachutists. NDAA compliance status and current program affiliations not publicly disclosed.
